title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : note de service
instructions: Lisez la note de service et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
To: All Staff
From: Human Resources
Subject: Office Renovation

We are pleased to announce that the renovation of the third floor will begin on June 20th. During this period, employees who normally work on that floor {{1}} be relocated to temporary desks on the second floor.

{{2}}, please remove all personal belongings from your current desk by June 18th.

The renovation is expected to improve lighting and add more meeting spaces. {{3}}, the new layout will include a quiet zone for focused work.

We appreciate your patience during this transition. If you have any concerns, please {{4}} to contact the HR department directly.

questions.explanation: La phrase décrit un événement futur ("will begin on June 20th"), il faut donc "will be relocated" (futur passif).
Le déménagement est la cause, le rangement des affaires en est la conséquence : "Therefore" introduit une conséquence logique.
On ajoute une information supplémentaire positive (un nouvel avantage de la rénovation) : "In addition".
Expression figée : "please feel free to contact...".
